class.name: CassieConstraintSolver
class.brief_description: Greedy KKT solver that snaps a Bezier curve to a set of constraints.
class.description:
Wraps the CASSIE constraint-solving pipeline: starts from all candidate constraints active, fits the curve, then greedily drops one constraint at a time as long as the overall objective decreases. The objective blends fidelity (how close the solved curve stays to the input) against constraint energy (how many candidates are satisfied) via [member CassieSolverParams.mu_fidelity].
The hard constraints (position pins, G1 colinearity, closed-loop self-intersection) are folded into a KKT system; the soft constraints (tangent alignment, planarity) augment the quadratic block. The system is solved with Eigen's [code]FullPivLU[/code] because the zero block on the diagonal makes it indefinite.

method.name: solve
method.description: Solves the constraint system and returns a [Dictionary] with the following keys: [code skip-lint]curve[/code] (the beautified [Curve3D]), [code]intersections[/code] (the surviving [CassieIntersectionConstraint] candidates), [code]mirror_constraints[/code], [code]applied_anchors[/code] (the anchor indices that received a position pin), [code]rejected_count[/code], [code]planar[/code], and [code]is_closed_loop[/code]. When the solver detects NaN/Inf in the result it falls back to returning the input curve unmodified.
